tool_summary.command:
\
  mv .venv .venv.stale && \
  uv sync --extra dev 2>&1 | tail -10 && \
  echo "--- pytest ---" && \
  uv run pytest -q 2>&1 | tail -30
tool_summary.description: Move stale venv aside, uv sync, run pytest

tool_summary.command:
mv .venv.stale /tmp/tk-agent-team-stale-venv-$$ && \
  cd /Users/tk/Code/tk-agent-team && \
  echo "=== Final tree ===" && \
  find . -type f -not -path './mcp-servers/agent-substrate/.venv/*' -not -p
tool_summary.description: Stash stale venv out of tree, show final project layout
